annotations.grafana.app/message: Increase default time-range for the dashboard

spec.expr:
topk(
  15,
  sum by (geoip_autonomous_system_organization) (
    count_over_time(
      {job="nginx"}
      | json
      | __error__ = ""
      | is_probe = 0
      | user_agent !~ "(?i).*(bot|crawler|spider|crawl|scanner|scraper|fetcher|monitor|preview|headless|python|curl|wget|httpclient|libwww|wordpress|wp-|sqlmap|nmap|nikto|zgrab|go-http-client|okhttp|java|facebookexternalhit|meta-webindexer|ahrefs|semrush|mj12bot|dotbot|bingbot|googlebot|amazonbot|petalbot|bytespider|applebot|slurp).*"
      | geoip_autonomous_system_organization !~ "(?i).*(amazon|amazon\\.com|aws|google|google llc|cloudflare|microsoft|azure|digitalocean|facebook|meta|oracle|alibaba|tencent|datacamp|cloudvider|ovh|huawei clouds).*"
      | request_uri !~ "(?i).*(\\.env|\\.php|\\.asp|\\.aspx|\\.cgi|\\.sql|\\.bak|\\.zip|\\.tar|\\.gz|\\.rar)$"
      | request_uri !~ "(?i).*(wp-admin|wp-login|wp-includes|xmlrpc|phpmyadmin|\\.git|\\.svn|cgi-bin|server-status|actuator|boaform|jenkins|admin|login).*"
      | geoip_autonomous_system_organization != ""
      [$__range]
    )
  )
)

topk(
  15,
  sum by (geoip_country_name) (
    count_over_time(
      {job="nginx"}
      | json
      | __error__ = ""
      | is_probe = 0
      | user_agent !~ "(?i).*(bot|crawler|spider|crawl|scanner|scraper|fetcher|monitor|preview|headless|python|curl|wget|httpclient|libwww|wordpress|wp-|sqlmap|nmap|nikto|zgrab|go-http-client|okhttp|java|facebookexternalhit|meta-webindexer|ahrefs|semrush|mj12bot|dotbot|bingbot|googlebot|amazonbot|petalbot|bytespider|applebot|slurp).*"
      | geoip_autonomous_system_organization !~ "(?i).*(amazon|amazon\\.com|aws|google|google llc|cloudflare|microsoft|azure|digitalocean|facebook|meta|oracle|alibaba|tencent|datacamp|cloudvider|ovh|huawei clouds).*"
      | request_uri !~ "(?i).*(\\.env|\\.php|\\.asp|\\.aspx|\\.cgi|\\.sql|\\.bak|\\.zip|\\.tar|\\.gz|\\.rar)$"
      | request_uri !~ "(?i).*(wp-admin|wp-login|wp-includes|xmlrpc|phpmyadmin|\\.git|\\.svn|cgi-bin|server-status|actuator|boaform|jenkins|admin|login).*"
      | status >= 400 and status < 500
      | geoip_country_name != ""
      [$__range]
    )
  )
)

topk(
  20,
  (
    100 *
    sum by (geoip_country_name) (
      count_over_time(
        {job="nginx"}
        | json
        | __error__ = ""
        | is_probe = 0
        | user_agent !~ "(?i).*(bot|crawler|spider|crawl|scanner|scraper|fetcher|monitor|preview|headless|python|curl|wget|httpclient|libwww|wordpress|wp-|sqlmap|nmap|nikto|zgrab|go-http-client|okhttp|java|facebookexternalhit|meta-webindexer|ahrefs|semrush|mj12bot|dotbot|bingbot|googlebot|amazonbot|petalbot|bytespider|applebot|slurp).*"
        | geoip_autonomous_system_organization !~ "(?i).*(amazon|amazon\\.com|aws|google|google llc|cloudflare|microsoft|azure|digitalocean|facebook|meta|oracle|alibaba|tencent|datacamp|cloudvider|ovh|huawei clouds).*"
        | request_uri !~ "(?i).*(\\.env|\\.php|\\.asp|\\.aspx|\\.cgi|\\.sql|\\.bak|\\.zip|\\.tar|\\.gz|\\.rar)$"
        | request_uri !~ "(?i).*(wp-admin|wp-login|wp-includes|xmlrpc|phpmyadmin|\\.git|\\.svn|cgi-bin|server-status|actuator|boaform|jenkins|admin|login).*"
        | status >= 200 and status < 400
        | geoip_country_name != ""
        [$__range]
      )
    )
    /
    sum by (geoip_country_name) (
      count_over_time(
        {job="nginx"}
        | json
        | __error__ = ""
        | is_probe = 0
        | user_agent !~ "(?i).*(bot|crawler|spider|crawl|scanner|scraper|fetcher|monitor|preview|headless|python|curl|wget|httpclient|libwww|wordpress|wp-|sqlmap|nmap|nikto|zgrab|go-http-client|okhttp|java|facebookexternalhit|meta-webindexer|ahrefs|semrush|mj12bot|dotbot|bingbot|googlebot|amazonbot|petalbot|bytespider|applebot|slurp).*"
        | geoip_autonomous_system_organization !~ "(?i).*(amazon|amazon\\.com|aws|google|google llc|cloudflare|microsoft|azure|digitalocean|facebook|meta|oracle|alibaba|tencent|datacamp|cloudvider|ovh|huawei clouds).*"
        | request_uri !~ "(?i).*(\\.env|\\.php|\\.asp|\\.aspx|\\.cgi|\\.sql|\\.bak|\\.zip|\\.tar|\\.gz|\\.rar)$"
        | request_uri !~ "(?i).*(wp-admin|wp-login|wp-includes|xmlrpc|phpmyadmin|\\.git|\\.svn|cgi-bin|server-status|actuator|boaform|jenkins|admin|login).*"
        | geoip_country_name != ""
        [$__range]
      )
    )
  )
  and on (geoip_country_name)
  (
    sum by (geoip_country_name) (
      count_over_time(
        {job="nginx"}
        | json
        | __error__ = ""
        | is_probe = 0
        | user_agent !~ "(?i).*(bot|crawler|spider|crawl|scanner|scraper|fetcher|monitor|preview|headless|python|curl|wget|httpclient|libwww|wordpress|wp-|sqlmap|nmap|nikto|zgrab|go-http-client|okhttp|java|facebookexternalhit|meta-webindexer|ahrefs|semrush|mj12bot|dotbot|bingbot|googlebot|amazonbot|petalbot|bytespider|applebot|slurp).*"
        | geoip_autonomous_system_organization !~ "(?i).*(amazon|amazon\\.com|aws|google|google llc|cloudflare|microsoft|azure|digitalocean|facebook|meta|oracle|alibaba|tencent|datacamp|cloudvider|ovh|huawei clouds).*"
        | request_uri !~ "(?i).*(\\.env|\\.php|\\.asp|\\.aspx|\\.cgi|\\.sql|\\.bak|\\.zip|\\.tar|\\.gz|\\.rar)$"
        | request_uri !~ "(?i).*(wp-admin|wp-login|wp-includes|xmlrpc|phpmyadmin|\\.git|\\.svn|cgi-bin|server-status|actuator|boaform|jenkins|admin|login).*"
        | geoip_country_name != ""
        [$__range]
      )
    ) >= 10
  )
)

topk(
  10,
  (
    1000 * avg by (geoip_country_name) (
      quantile_over_time(
        0.95,
        {job="nginx"}
        | json
        | __error__ = ""
        | is_probe = 0
        | user_agent !~ "(?i).*(bot|crawler|spider|crawl|scanner|scraper|fetcher|monitor|preview|headless|python|curl|wget|httpclient|libwww|wordpress|wp-|sqlmap|nmap|nikto|zgrab|go-http-client|okhttp|java|facebookexternalhit|meta-webindexer|ahrefs|semrush|mj12bot|dotbot|bingbot|googlebot|amazonbot|petalbot|bytespider|applebot|slurp).*"
        | geoip_autonomous_system_organization !~ "(?i).*(amazon|amazon\\.com|aws|google|google llc|cloudflare|microsoft|azure|digitalocean|facebook|meta|oracle|alibaba|tencent|datacamp|cloudvider|ovh|huawei clouds).*"
        | request_uri !~ "(?i).*(\\.env|\\.php|\\.asp|\\.aspx|\\.cgi|\\.sql|\\.bak|\\.zip|\\.tar|\\.gz|\\.rar)$"
        | request_uri !~ "(?i).*(wp-admin|wp-login|wp-includes|xmlrpc|phpmyadmin|\\.git|\\.svn|cgi-bin|server-status|actuator|boaform|jenkins|admin|login).*"
        | geoip_country_name != ""
        | unwrap request_time
        | __error__ = ""
        [60m]
      )
    )
  )
  and on (geoip_country_name)
  (
    sum by (geoip_country_name) (
      count_over_time(
        {job="nginx"}
        | json
        | __error__ = ""
        | is_probe = 0
        | user_agent !~ "(?i).*(bot|crawler|spider|crawl|scanner|scraper|fetcher|monitor|preview|headless|python|curl|wget|httpclient|libwww|wordpress|wp-|sqlmap|nmap|nikto|zgrab|go-http-client|okhttp|java|facebookexternalhit|meta-webindexer|ahrefs|semrush|mj12bot|dotbot|bingbot|googlebot|amazonbot|petalbot|bytespider|applebot|slurp).*"
        | geoip_autonomous_system_organization !~ "(?i).*(amazon|amazon\\.com|aws|google|google llc|cloudflare|microsoft|azure|digitalocean|facebook|meta|oracle|alibaba|tencent|datacamp|cloudvider|ovh|huawei clouds).*"
        | request_uri !~ "(?i).*(\\.env|\\.php|\\.asp|\\.aspx|\\.cgi|\\.sql|\\.bak|\\.zip|\\.tar|\\.gz|\\.rar)$"
        | request_uri !~ "(?i).*(wp-admin|wp-login|wp-includes|xmlrpc|phpmyadmin|\\.git|\\.svn|cgi-bin|server-status|actuator|boaform|jenkins|admin|login).*"
        | geoip_country_name != ""
        [$__range]
      )
    ) >= 10
  )
)
